name: mini-campaign-manager
description: Mini Campaign Manager — a simplified MarTech tool for creating, scheduling, and tracking email campaigns.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "yarn workspace @mcm/api dev" "yarn workspace @mcm/web dev"
scripts.test: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude mini-campaign-manager run test
scripts.lint: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude mini-campaign-manager run lint
